portfolioProjects.title: E-Commerce Footwear Brand Website
portfolioProjects.shortDescription: A fully custom payment gateway integrated modern e-commerce site for a footwear brand.
portfolioProjects.fullDescription: We developed a blazing fast e-commerce landing page and shopping portal for FitStep. It features a stunning product gallery, a custom cart, and a streamlined checkout system.
portfolioProjects.challenge: Customers were abandoning their carts because the site was too slow when shopping from mobile devices.
portfolioProjects.solution: We built a speed-optimized and mobile-first shopping experience using Next.js/React and Tailwind CSS, loading in under 1 second.
process: Integration of simplified cod-friendly checkout form
Performance optimization and lazy loading asset config
portfolioProjects.results: In the first month after launch, the bounce rate decreased by 35% and online sales increased by 42%.
portfolioProjects.seoDescription: How B2bfiy developed a blazing fast e-commerce portal for FitStep BD boosting conversions by 42%.

portfolioProjects.title: Social Media Brand Identity & Creatives
portfolioProjects.shortDescription: Facebook & Instagram campaign post design and branding guidelines for a premium restaurant.
portfolioProjects.fullDescription: A cohesive color palette and a series of attractive design templates were prepared for Flavor Junction, giving their social media pages a professional look.
portfolioProjects.challenge: Previous posts were disorganized with no brand consistency, which was reducing customer trust.
portfolioProjects.solution: We designed a luxury food branding guideline blending red and gold colors, and delivered over 20 custom social media graphic designs.
process: Brand Identity Definition & Color Palette Selection
Food photography retouching and banner design
portfolioProjects.results: Message inquiries on social pages and table bookings at the restaurant increased by 30%.
portfolioProjects.seoTitle: Flavor Junction Brand Identity Case Study - B2bfiy
portfolioProjects.seoDescription: Consistent restaurant branding and social media graphic design case study by B2bfiy.

portfolioProjects.title: High-Converting Facebook Ad Reels & Shorts
portfolioProjects.shortDescription: Creation of Reels and Shorts with engaging motion graphics and custom captions for Facebook ad campaigns.
portfolioProjects.fullDescription: To boost product sales, we created 7 engaging short videos using 3-second hooks to capture user attention, paired with outstanding B-roll editing.
portfolioProjects.challenge: Standard videos had low customer retention, and sales from Facebook ads were not meeting expectations.
portfolioProjects.solution: We edited and optimized the ads with dynamic text animations, trending sound effects, and high-retention hook editing.
process: Video editing with high retention sound effects
portfolioProjects.results: The ad ROI (Return on Investment) increased by 2.5x, and video view retention increased by 60%.
portfolioProjects.seoTitle: Skincare Reels Ad Campaign Case Study - B2bfiy
portfolioProjects.seoDescription: How short form viral video editing boosted Skincare Essentials sales and engagement.

testimonials.review: B2bfiy optimized our shoe e-commerce site's speed and social design. Their work quality is amazing and their customer response is extremely fast.
Because of their custom social media design campaigns, our restaurant's customer bookings have increased significantly. Our branding now looks highly professional!

faqs.question: How much does a project cost?
faqs.answer: We have specific, affordable packages for each of our services. Prices are determined based on the scope of development or service requested. For custom projects, we define the budget based on your requirements.

faqs.question: How long does website development take?
faqs.answer: Typically, a landing page or basic site takes 7-10 working days, and a dynamic, large e-commerce or business site is delivered within 10-20 working days.

faqs.question: Do you work with international clients?
faqs.answer: Yes, in addition to local businesses, we work with global marketplaces and provide remote custom solutions and support for clients from various countries.

faqs.question: Can I request a custom package?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! If your requirements are outside of our standard packages, you can contact us directly via the 'Request a Custom Quote' form or through WhatsApp to create a personalized package.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Yes, even after a project goes live, we provide 30 to 60 days of completely free support and maintenance depending on the package. After that, monthly custom support packages are available at nominal rates.

faqs.question: How do I get started?
faqs.answer: Simply fill out the 'Get a Free Audit' form on our website or click the WhatsApp icon to start a direct consultation with our team.
